title: Deadly Zombies
description: This mod brings stronger zombies into the game.
body:
This mod brings stronger zombies into the game. They no longer die in the sunlight. Also, any villager who dies becomes a zombie.

 

You will have more fun with this mod, especially you will have to try harder to survive.

Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deadly-zombies
